name: Kashyap Yechuri
body:
### Who Am I?
I am a software developer currently pursuing my undergrad in computer science at Clemson University. I am always striving to learn new software development techniques, and spend much of my free time writing software. 

I am actively fielding internship offers for Summer 2015 in the Bay Area. If you would be interested in hiring me, please email me at kashyap.y@gmail.com.
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
